ORDER GRANTING CONTINUANCE OF THE TRIAL DATE PURSUANT TO STIPULATION
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: KING, EDWARD VINCENT SUBSTITUTED FOR RABER, SCOTT R. AS ATTORNEY FOR EXECUPARK, INC.

REMOVED FROM COURT TRIAL CALENDAR. A CONFIDENTIAL SETTLEMENT IS REACHED ON WEDNESDAY, AUGUST-14-2013. TERMS OF A WRITTEN SETTLEMENT ARE APPROVED BY THE COURT AND AGREED UPON BY ALL PARTIES AND RESPECTIVE COUNSEL. THE COURT RETAINS JURISDICTION OF THE CAUSE TO ENFORCE TERMS OF THE CONFIDENTIAL SETTLEMENT & PLAINTIFF WAIVES ANY FURTHER CLAIMS; EACH SIDE TO BEAR ITS OWN ATTORNEY FEES AND COSTS. ALL EXHIBITS ARE RETURNED TO COUNSEL. JUDGE: VJ HON. LESLIE C. NICHOLS; CLERK MARJORIE L. MANZELLA; NOT REPORTED (D-624).
